agent_description: Multi-model AI agent with NanoShield security (221 patterns), IronDNA adaptive personality, Squad multi-agent routing, and vision-based Minecraft gameplay using GPT-4o/Kimi K2.5
changelog: Fixed NanoShield interception bug: Minecraft multi-turn messages were being misclassified as safety threats due to 'attack' keyword overlap, causing Security Analysis Report output instead of valid JSON actions
